dialogueChunks.intro: We did it, {player_name}. Against all odds, we managed to {quest_action}. {quest_focus} is ours.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} are no longer a concern, and {quest_stakes} are secured. {quest_ally} is already talking about what comes next.
dialogueChunks.outro: None of this would have been possible without your courage. You turned a wild ambition into reality.

playerResponses.text: It was a worthy endeavor. I am glad we saw it through.
Next time, warn me about the dangers upfront.
Just make sure those efforts were not wasted.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I can hardly believe it worked. {quest_focus} has been opened, and what we found inside exceeded every expectation.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes} are now within our grasp. The scholars and traders are already making plans. {quest_threat} proved formidable, but your determination proved greater.
dialogueChunks.outro: History will remember this enterprise. And your name will be part of it.

playerResponses.text: I do not need my name in a book. The result is enough.
I prefer tangible rewards over fame.

dialogueChunks.intro: The impossible is now possible, {player_name}. Thanks to your efforts to {quest_action}, {quest_focus} is finally accessible.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Trade caravans, scholars, settlers: they will all benefit from what you have accomplished. {quest_stakes} are no longer just a dream.
dialogueChunks.outro: You dared greatly, and the rewards speak for themselves. Thank you.

playerResponses.text: Fortune favors the bold. It was my pleasure.
Let us hope the next enterprise is less harrowing.
Keep me in mind for the next big venture.
